courseName: Exa: A Beginner's Guide to Search API
description: Exa is a search engine built for AI agents, not humans. Learn how highlights help AI skim results, how MCP lets your AI call Exa directly, and how the Search and Contents APIs return clean, ready-to-use answers and web content.

courseName: Tavily: Live Web Answers for Builders
description: Tavily helps AI agents search and crawl the live web. Learn to map sites, track usage and credits, tell search from research, handle async jobs and rate limits, call Tavily from Python, and get fast, sourced answers to everyday questions.

courseName: Suno: A Beginner's Guide to prompt
description: A beginner-friendly course on Suno, covering Vocal Separation, Timestamped Lyrics, Audio Processing, music style. Moves from mental models to practical usage. Capstone: understanding Music Video Generation.
